channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Scoop: White House workshops plan to bring back Anthropic
item.description: The White House is developing guidance that would allow agencies to get around Anthropic's supply chain risk designation and onboard new models includ...

item.title: Scoop: Trump huddles with oil execs as Iran stalemate drags on
item.description: President Trump and top lieutenants met with oil and gas execs at the White House on Tuesday to discuss the energy fallout of the Iran war and other t...

item.title: Behind the Curtain: We've been warned
item.description: Six facts. No hyperbole . All in the past 60 days. AI is the fastest-growing product category in world history. One of the latest models is so powerfu...

item.title: Red-meat retribution: Trump escalates campaign against MAGA foes
item.description: The Trump administration moved Tuesday against three enemies of the MAGA coalition: a former Anthony Fauci adviser, Somali-run daycare centers in Minn...
